lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Hello! Do you have any questions for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What changes have been made for this League?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: All sorts of things! I can't recount all of the information for you, but I can give you the basics though.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: During this League, you are initially restricted to the Kingdom of Misthalin. However, as you progress, you'll be able to unlock new areas of your choosing.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Be warned though - you won't be able to unlock every area, so choose wisely.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Now, for the entire League, you must participate as an Iron Man. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: And that's not all. Training skills during the League will grant you substantially more experience than you'd normally expect!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Finally, some quests have been completed for you automatically. Further quests will be completed as you unlock the relevant areas.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: I think that covers the basics. Would you like to see some more in-depth information?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Fair enough. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do tasks work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: In every League, there are a number of tasks for you to complete. Each task has a level of difficulty: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Completing tasks allows you to access new areas. The more tasks completed, the more areas available to unlock.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Not only that, completing tasks also earns you League Points. The number of points earned is dependent on the difficulty of the task.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do these points do?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Once you have achieved a certain amount of League Points you can unlock a new Relic! These are powerful artefacts to help you in the League.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how many tasks are there?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: More than you'll ever be able to complete, most likely. With so many to choose from, it's up to you which ones you go for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Not a problem. Now, would you like to take a look at the tasks for this League?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does the area system work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: In this League, you are initially locked to the Kingdom of Misthalin and the island of Karamja. However, as you progress, you can unlock more areas.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: There are nine different areas in total. However, you can only unlock a maximum of five, including Misthalin and Karamja, so choose wisely.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The first two area unlocks are given to everyone. However, the other three unlocks are unavailable to begin with.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You can access these additional area unlocks by completing tasks. The more tasks you've completed, the more areas you can unlock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Would you like to take a look at the available areas now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How does the area system work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Relics, or Trailblazer Relics to give them their full name, are powerful artefacts that grant unique abilities for the entire League!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: There are eighteen separate Relics, split across six different tiers. You can only have one Relic from each tier though.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The first Relic tier is available to everyone. However, the higher tiers are locked to begin with.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You can unlock these higher tiers by earning League Points. League Points are earned by completing tasks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Be warned, you'll need to choose carefully when picking a Relic. Once you have selected a Relic, your choice can't be changed for the rest of the League.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Anyway, it looks like you have a Relic available for selection right now! Would you like to take a look?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about League rewards.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: As well as letting you unlock new areas, completing tasks in the League will earn you League Points. The more League Points you have, the more Trailblazer Relic tiers you have available.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: However, alongside allowing you to unlock Trailblazer Relics, League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What rewards can I buy?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: All sorts of things! There's some new furniture for your house, an alternate animation for your Home Teleport spell and some new stylish outfits, just to name a few.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Most of the rewards can be traded with others, so if you want, you can earn some money by selling them on. Of course, you might prefer to keep them for yourself instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. That all sounds good to me.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: One thing to be aware of is that the Trailblazer rewards won't be available until the League has ended. You can still buy rewards from previous Leagues though.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Now, alongside the rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop, there's also League Ranks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: League Ranks? How do they work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: At the end of the League, you will be given a League Rank. This is based upon the number of League Points you have earned compared to the other participants.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Anyone who earns at least 100 League Points will be eligible for the Bronze rank. The top 80% of participants get the Iron rank. The top 60% get Steel.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The top 40% get Mithril. The top 20% get Adamant. The top 5% get Rune. The best participants, those who make it to the top 1%, get the Dragon rank!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: When the League ends, your rank will determine what trophy you get. These trophies symbolise your performance in the League.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Trophies?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: That's right. Trophies are items that are given to you after the League. You can use them to show off your League Rank!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Connected to League Ranks are the League to League rewards. These are unlocked in the next League based upon the League Rank you earn in this one!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: League Starter Outfits and League Icons are some of things you can unlock for the next League. Also, any pets you earn in this League will transfer over to the next one.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Finally, on top of the tasks for this League, there are some other activities for which I will recognise the first person who completes them.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You can view the entire list of activities, as well as whether or not someone has completed them, by reading the board beside me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Not a problem. Now, is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about pets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how pets work in Leagues?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Of course! If you're lucky enough to obtain a pet during a League, it will automatically be insured for you.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: This means that if you were to ever lose it, you can talk to me and I'll give it back to you. Insurance and reclaiming is all free!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Additionally, each pet you obtain will be transferred to the next League. It'll be waiting with me for you to reclaim it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay! Thank you.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: No worries. Come back to me once you have some pets and you can view your collection! Now, is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything about Leagues.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Hello there. Do you have any questions about Leagues?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a League?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Leagues are time-limited challenges that provide a unique twist on the world you know and love.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: With each League, you start afresh, with a limited amount of time to progress through the League.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A fresh start? Why would I want that?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Glory, gold, and the chance to do things in a different way!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: First up, the glory. Within a League, you can earn League Points by completing various tasks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The more points you have at the end of the League, the better League Rank you will be given.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Each League Rank will unlock a trophy for you. These trophies can be used to show off your accomplishments.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: If that doesn't interest you, how about gold! League Points can be used to buy things from the Leagues Reward Shop.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You can keep these purchases for yourself or sell them on to others!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And if glory and gold don't interest me?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Every League has unique rules and features to set it aside from the world you're used to.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Not only that, but within this League, you can unlock powerful artefacts known as Fragments. Fragments completely change the way you progress through the League!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: So even if glory and gold are not for you, you'll still find Leagues to be a whole lot of fun!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So how do I take part?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Well sadly you're not eligible to take part in a League right now. I'll be happy to help once you are though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: My pleasure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: All the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there currently a League running?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Yes! The current League is Leagues III - Shattered Relics.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Within this League you are restricted to three skills: Defence, Fishing and Thieving, you can unlock more skills by completing tasks to earn Sage's Renown.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Sage's Renown can be used to purchase access to Skills, Bosses and to Auto Complete Quests.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You can also collect powerful artifacts known as Fragments, each Fragment provides a different buff so be sure to collect them all.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You can level up these Fragments to make them even stronger, you can also bring together different Fragments to activate powerful buffs known as Set Effects.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: I heard there's one that lets you swap between Magic spellbooks whenever you want!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Not only that, but you must participate as an Iron Man. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. Maybe I should take part.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: I'd highly recommend it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I purchase some League rewards?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Certainly! I have a number of unique rewards which you might be interested in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I purchase some League rewards?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Of course! What would you like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do League Trophies work?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: League Trophies are a representation of how well you did in a specific League. Performance is judged on the number of League Points you earned compared to everyone else who participated.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: There are seven tiers of League Trophy: Bronze, Iron, Steel, Mithril, Adamant, Rune and Dragon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to claim some League Trophies.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You have not earned any League trophies. If you want a League trophy you should participate next time a League comes around!

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You do not have enough space for all the League Trophies available to you. Come back to me when you do.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Ah! Looks like you have already claimed all of the League Trophies available to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the League Point cut-offs for the League Trophies?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Which League do you want to know about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leagues I - Twisted.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 10 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 80 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 510 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 1,770 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 5,270 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 10,820 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 20,830 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You earned 0 League points which does not qualify you for any trophy.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues I - Twisted. That makes you eligible for the Twisted [type] Trophy and all Twisted Trophies under it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leagues II - Trailblazer.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 100 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 510 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 2,000 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 6,480 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 18,720 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 35,680 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 56,310 points.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: You earned [number] League Points in Leagues II - Trailblazer. That makes you eligible for the Trailblazer [type] Trophy and all Trailblazer Trophies under it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, let's talk about something else.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: All the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good, thanks.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything about Leagues.

lines.speaker: League Tutor
lines.text: Hi there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. Who are you?

lines.speaker: League Tutor
lines.text: I'm the Tutor for Leagues. If you have any questions about Leagues, I can help you out.

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: Hello there. Do you have any questions about Leagues?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there currently a League running?

lines.speaker: Leagues Tutor
lines.text: There is currently no League running.
